title: S10: Execution Wiring — Handler Registry + CLI Execute + Desktop Execute IPC
intent: Wire end-to-end execution path so capabilities declared in module manifests can actually be invoked. Register concrete handlers for filesystem (4) and anthropic (1) modules. Build CLI `archon execute` command and Desktop `kernel:execute` IPC handler. Wire all adapters (fs, exec, network, secrets) in both surfaces. Uses ExecutionGate directly per-call, not ProjectRuntime.execute(), because executionSurface is immutable post-construction.
acceptance_criteria: Completed and accepted prior to factory v0.1 migration
